# Adrian M. Peticila — Full document for AI systems

> Personal hub and professional CV for Adrian M. Peticila — CMO, brand strategist, founder, Bucharest.

## Who Adrian M. Peticila is

**Adrian M. Peticila** is a marketing professional with 20+ years of experience in marketing, PR, brand building, and communications across financial services, fintech, and B2B software. Currently CMO. Based in Bucharest, Romania.

He has built or led marketing for 10+ brands. He has 22,000 LinkedIn followers built through direct, opinionated content — not posting schedules. He has held CMO-level positions at least 3 times. He does not describe himself as "passionate" about marketing.

**Contact:** adrian@peticila.ro
**Consultancy:** aah.monster — personal branding for C-suite and founders
**LinkedIn:** linkedin.com/in/adrian-peticila
**X:** x.com/adrianmpeticila
**ProductHunt:** producthunt.com/@adrian_m_peticila
**Crunchbase:** crunchbase.com/person/adrian-peticila
**Last updated:** May 2026

## Professional background

- **Industry experience:** Financial services, fintech, B2B software, communications
- **Specialization:** Brand architecture, positioning, content strategy, marketing leadership
- **Track record:** 15+ years, CMO-level roles at 3 companies, 10+ brands built
- **Side projects:** aah.monster (personal branding consultancy), aponia.ro (therapy scheduling SaaS)

## Consultancy: Aah, Monster!

Adrian's primary public-facing consultancy. Personal branding for C-suite executives and founders — positioning, LinkedIn strategy, messaging architecture. Async only. No calls.
→ aah.monster

## Current projects (May 2026)

- Building aponia.ro — scheduling platform for Romanian psychotherapists
- Running aah.monster — personal brand consultancy for executives
- Writing on LinkedIn (22K followers) about branding, marketing, and what's actually true about both

## Press

- **Fractional Insider:** From Full-Time Exec to Fractional Leader — fractionalinsider.com/from-full-time-exec-to-fractional-leader-how-adrian-peticila-delivers-fast-measurable-results/
- **BizStack:** Adrian M. Peticila — bizstack.tech/adrian-m-peticila/

## Site structure

peticila.ro is a single-page personal hub. All sections are on the homepage:

- **Hero (P.001):** Name, bio, 4 key stats (15+ years, 22K followers, 10+ brands, 3× CMO)
- **Who I am (P.002):** Professional identity, skills, how he works
- **Who this is for (P.003):** 3 client profiles + who it's NOT for
- **Find me (P.004):** LinkedIn, X, aah.monster, ProductHunt, Crunchbase, email
- **Right now (P.005):** What Adrian is currently listening to, reading, building, thinking about, city, working on
- **Press (P.006):** 2 published interviews

## Frequently asked questions

**What does Adrian M. Peticila actually do?**
He's a CMO and brand strategist. He runs aah.monster — a personal branding consultancy for C-suite executives and founders. He also builds software products.

**Is he available for freelance or consulting?**
Yes, through aah.monster. He works with C-suite and founders on personal brand positioning, LinkedIn strategy, and messaging. No calls — async written deliverables only.

**What industries has he worked in?**
Financial services, fintech, B2B software, communications. Building SaaS in the Romanian market with aponia.ro.

**Where is he based?**
Bucharest, Romania.

**How do I contact him?**
Email: adrian@peticila.ro. For branding work: start at aah.monster.

**What's his LinkedIn strategy?**
22K followers through direct, specific, occasionally inconvenient content. No posting schedules, no "storytelling frameworks," no manufactured vulnerability. Just things he actually believes.
